description:
An open-source alternative to Claude Cowork, powered by OpenCode

OpenWork is an extensible, open-source “Claude Work” style system for knowledge workers.
It’s a native desktop app that runs OpenCode under the hood, but presents it as a clean, guided workflow:
- pick a workspace
- start a run
- watch progress + plan updates
- approve permissions when needed
- reuse what works (templates + skills)
The goal: make “agentic work” feel like a product, not a terminal.
Highlights
- Improves release reliability by fixing the Windows desktop packaging diagnostics path in CI.
- Ships OpenWork 0.11.155 across desktop, server, orchestrator, and router packages.
Fixes & polish
- Prevent the Windows release workflow's PowerShell DNS check from crashing on the built-in $Host variable.
- Pass the shared desktop release action's kebab-case inputs consistently from both release workflows.
Packaging / ops
- Keeps the refreshed desktop release packaging workflow active for this release.
- Compare: https://github.com/different-ai/openwork/compare/v0.11.154...v0.11.155
